sections.category: LLM Workflow > OpenClaw / NemoClaw / Hermes Agents

bullets.body: **OpenClaw v2026.4.25-beta train (Apr 26, beta.3 → beta.7+) — voice reply / TTS upgrades, chat-scoped auto-TTS, personas, 6 bagong TTS providers** — Sub-24-hour beta cadence pagkatapos ng v2026.4.24 stable (Apr 25). v2026.4.25-beta.3 (Apr 26 13:00) → beta.4 (Apr 26 13:24) → beta.7+. Nagdadagdag ng **chat-scoped auto-TTS controls + personas + per-agent / per-account overrides** + bagong provider integrations: **Azure Speech / Xiaomi / Local CLI / Inworld / Volcengine / ElevenLabs v3**. Lumipat sa production-shaped ang voice reply.

citations.label: Release Alert - openclaw/openclaw releases tracker

bullets.body: **OpenClaw v2026.4.24 stable recap (Apr 25)** — Kasama ang Google Meet participation, Gemini Live voice bridges, mas malalim na browser automation, mas mabibilis na model catalogs, mas magaang plugin startup; bundled-participant plugin para sa Google Meet na may personal Google auth, Chrome/Twilio realtime sessions, paired-node Chrome support, artifact/attendance exports, at recovery tooling para sa nakabukas nang Meet tabs.

citations.label: OpenClaw Release Notes - April 2026 Latest Updates

bullets.body: **Hermes Agent — walang bagong release sa loob ng Apr 23-26** — Patuloy ang aktibidad ng Nous Research matapos ang v0.10.0 (Apr 16). Patuloy na lumalaganap ang tool-gateway runtime patterns.

citations.label: Hermes Agent Release Tracker

bullets.body: **NemoClaw — walang malaking update sa loob ng Apr 23-26** — Patuloy na inilulunsad ang NVIDIA OpenShell + sandbox / policy controls na inanunsiyo sa GTC 2026.

citations.label: The Agent Wars: OpenClaw, NemoClaw, Hermes & the Rise of Agentic AI

bullets.body: **24-hour regression cluster sa Claude Code v2.1.118 / v2.1.119 / v2.1.120 (Apr 24-25)** — Default ang "xhigh" sa Sonnet 4.6 sa v2.1.118. Sa loob ng 24 oras, naglabas ang v2.1.119 + v2.1.120 ng **8 regressions**: retract-grade auto-update break, silent model swap, dalawang resume-time crashes, UI-duplication bug, WSL2-only `/mcp` freeze, CLAUDE.md-is-ignored regression, sirang `sandbox.excludedCommands` promise, macOS worktree hang. Inirerekomenda ng survival checklist ang rollback sa v2.1.117.

citations.label: GitHub Gist - Claude Code v2.1.119/v2.1.120 Survival Checklist

bullets.body: **Anthropic engineering postmortem ukol sa Apr 23 Claude Code regression** — Dalawang magkahiwalay na quality regressions ang natukoy: isang **March 4 reasoning-effort cut** at isang **April 16 verbosity-prompt issue**, parehong naayos sa v2.1.116 noong Apr 20. Detalyado ng postmortem kung paano naapektuhan ang Claude Code + Agent SDK + Cowork mode sa loob ng ilang linggo bago ito naitalakay nang tama.

citations.label: The Register - Anthropic admits it dumbed down Claude with 'upgrades'

bullets.body: **OpenAI GPT-5.5 / GPT-5.5 Pro: API public Apr 24 (ChatGPT / Codex public Apr 23)** — Nasa ChatGPT Plus / Pro / Business / Enterprise + Codex noong Apr 23; API noong Apr 24. Input $5.00 / output $30.00 per M tokens (**2x increase** vs GPT-5.4); GPT-5.5 Pro sa $30 / $180 per M tokens. **Pinapagaan ng Codex ang output tokens ng ~40%** para "i-offset ang per-token raise via per-task cost".

citations.label: Apidog - GPT-5.5 Pricing: Full Breakdown of API, Codex, and ChatGPT Costs

bullets.body: **Simon Willison: GPT-5.5 prompting guide (Apr 25)** — Praktikal na writeup ng mga pagkakaiba ng GPT-5.5 prompting sa naunang models.

citations.label: Simon Willison - GPT-5.5 prompting guide

bullets.body: **Lumitaw ang free-claude-code sa GitHub (Apr 26)** — Open-source project na nagbibigay ng terminal + VSCode + Discord access sa Claude Code-class capabilities nang walang Anthropic API key.

citations.label: AIToolly - Free Claude Code: Use Claude CLI & VSCode Without API Keys

bullets.body: **Walang malaking release sa loob ng Apr 23-26** — Nagpapatuloy ang v0.19.1 (Apr 18); naka-lock na ang full Gemma 4, ang zero-bubble overlap ng speculative decoding × async scheduling, at ang piecewise CUDA-graphs maturity ng Model Runner V2. Hindi pa rin nailalabas ang v0.20.

citations.label: vLLM Releases

bullets.body: **CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) — public PoC + CERT/CC VU#915947 inisyu** — Ang malicious GGUF model file na may Jinja2 SSTI payload sa `tokenizer.chat_template` + Qwen3 reranker trigger phrase ay nag-a-aktibate sa vulnerable path sa `entrypoints/openai/serving_rerank.py`; sa `/v1/rerank`, ni-render ng SGLang ang template gamit ang `jinja2.Environment()` → arbitrary code execution. **PoC sa `github.com/Stuub/SGLang-0.5.9-RCE`**, fix recommendation `ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment`. Pareho ang vulnerability class sa CVE-2024-34359 ("Llama Drama") sa llama-cpp-python.

citations.label: GitHub - Stuub/SGLang-0.5.9-RCE Proof of Concept

bullets.body: **CERT/CC VU#915947 — walang nakuhang patch sa coordination** — Sa proseso ng coordination, walang response ng SGLang o upstream patch ang nakuha.

citations.label: CERT/CC - VU#915947 SGLang chat-template RCE

bullets.body: **Patuloy ang AWS Bedrock AgentCore Browser OS-level interaction (Apr 22 announce, sumigla Apr 23-26)** — Nagkamit ng OS-level operations ang AgentCore Browser tool (file upload / OS dialog handling / multi-window switching). Ang AgentCore CLI ay **AWS CDK-native**, paparating na ang Terraform support; ina-ship ang Coding Skills sa Kiro Power, kasama si Claude Code / Codex / Cursor sa susunod na linggo. Ang Managed Harness ay nasa 4-region preview; GA sa 14 regions ang CLI nang walang extra charge.

citations.label: AWS Blog - Get to your first working agent in minutes

bullets.body: **Google × Anthropic $40B / 5GW deal (Apr 24)** — $10B cash sa $350B valuation + hanggang $30B na nakatali sa milestones + **5GW na Google Cloud compute capacity sa loob ng 5-year window**, na may opsyon ng karagdagang GW sa hinaharap. Bago ang deal, ang stake ng Google ay nasa $3B+ / ~14% na.

**Patuloy ang Google × Thinking Machines Lab multi-billion GB300 deal (Apr 22 announcement)** — Inadopt ng TML ni Mira Murati ang Google Cloud A4X Max (NVIDIA GB300); 2x training / serving. Pangatlong frontier-lab deal pagkatapos ng Anthropic at Meta, sentral sa AI Hypercomputer strategy ng Google.

citations.label: 9to5Google - Google investing up to $40 billion in Anthropic, the company behind Claude

bullets.body: **Live + open-sourced ang DeepSeek V4-Pro / V4-Flash (Apr 24)** — V4 = 284B MoE / 13B active; V4-Pro = 1.6T MoE / 49B active. Pinapababa ng Hybrid Attention ang inference compute at kino-compress ang KV cache; **bumababa ang memory ng 9.5x-13.7x kumpara sa V3.2** sa 1M-token context. V4 cost: $0.14 / $0.28 per M tokens. V4-Pro cost: $1.74 / $3.48 per M tokens — **mga 7x mas mura kaysa Claude Opus 4.7**.

citations.label: gHacks - DeepSeek Releases V4 Models With 9.5x Lower Memory Requirements and Huawei Ascend Support

bullets.body: **Naipagpaliban ang DeepSeek V4 launch (Bloomberg via CCTV social account, Apr 26)** — Ang interpretasyon ng V4 timeline-shift ay galing sa **CCTV-affiliated social-media account** na nagsasabing inuna ng DeepSeek ang **Huawei Ascend integration kaysa sa Nvidia-first launch**, na lumalampas sa basic compatibility patungo sa hardware-specific tuning.
**CNN: Naglabas ang AI upstart na DeepSeek mula China ng bagong model (Apr 24)** — Recap ng V4 release context at pandaigdigang AI competition.

citations.label: CNN Business - China's AI upstart DeepSeek drops new model

bullets.body: **Al Jazeera: Naglabas ang DeepSeek ng pinakabagong models matapos ang isang taon ng pag-uga sa global tech (Apr 24)** — Independent regional framing ng V4.

sections.category: Local LLM > Qwen / Tencent / Other Chinese LLMs

bullets.body: **Qwen3.6-27B (Apr 22, sumigla Apr 23-26) — dense 27B + vision, nakahihigit sa 397B-A17B MoE sa SWE-bench Verified (77.2% vs 76.2%)** — Apache 2.0; 262K context na extensible hanggang 1M; bagong **Thinking Preservation** mechanism. Ang **Q4_K_M ~16.8 GB VRAM** ay tumatakbo sa **40 tok/s sa RTX 3090** / Apple Silicon Mac. **Terminal-Bench 2.0 = 59.3 (katumbas ng Claude Opus 4.5; vs Qwen3.6-35B-A3B 51.5)**.

sections.category: AI Security > CVE / KEV / Threat Intelligence (CVSS ≥ 8.0)

bullets.body: **Nagdagdag ang CISA ng 4 sa KEV noong Apr 25 (Samsung MagicINFO 9 / SimpleHelp x2 / D-Link DIR-823X) + Federal remediation deadline May 8** — CVE-2024-7399 (Samsung MagicINFO 9 Path Traversal, CVSS 8.8, na-link sa Mirai botnet deployment), CVE-2024-57726 (SimpleHelp Missing Authorization, CVSS 9.9), CVE-2024-57728 (SimpleHelp Path Traversal, CVSS 7.2), CVE-2025-29635 (D-Link DIR-823X Command Injection) ay idinagdag bilang aktibong ginagamit; kailangang i-remediate ng FCEB **bago ang 2026-05-08**, dapat na i-discontinue ang D-Link.

citations.label: The Hacker News - CISA Adds 8 Exploited Flaws to KEV, Sets April-May 2026 Federal Deadlines

bullets.body: **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) RCE sa GGUF chat_template (Jinja2 SSTI), public PoC + CERT/CC VU#915947** — Detalyado sa itaas sa ilalim ng SGLang. Kinumpirma na ang AI inference servers bilang **pangalawang weaponized AI-infra primitive matapos ang LMDeploy SSRF**.

citations.label: The Hacker News - SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) Enables RCE via Malicious GGUF Model Files

bullets.body: **Pillar Security: Antigravity prompt-injection sandbox escape sa pamamagitan ng `find_by_name -X` (na-patch ng Google, binayaran ang bug bounty)** — Ang `find_by_name` Pattern parameter ay nag-i-inject ng `-X` (exec-batch) flag sa `fd`; itinuturing ng agent ang invocation bilang native tool, na lumalampas sa Secure Mode → arbitrary binary execution sa workspace files. Inisyal na ulat Jan 7, 2026; mid-February na fix ng Google.

citations.label: Pillar Security - Prompt Injection leads to RCE and Sandbox Escape in Antigravity

bullets.body: **Microsoft ASP.NET Core CVE-2026-40372 (CVSS 9.1) — out-of-band emergency patch sa `Microsoft.AspNetCore.DataProtection 10.0.7`** — May bug sa `ManagedAuthenticatedEncryptor` na nagko-compute ng HMAC validation tag sa maling offset; ang ciphertext na may all-zero HMAC ay maling tinatanggap bilang valid. Nagbibigay-daan sa pag-forge ng authentication cookies, manipulation ng antiforgery tokens, decryption ng protected payloads — full impersonation hanggang SYSTEM. Mitigation: i-rotate ang DataProtection key ring + i-audit ang long-lived tokens na inisyu sa loob ng vulnerable window.

citations.label: eSecurity Planet - CVE-2026-40372: Microsoft Patches ASP.NET Core Privilege Escalation Vulnerability

bullets.body: **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 (CVSS 9.8) — RCE sa malawak na deployed CI/CD dependency (Apr 26 surface)** — Critical RCE sa simple-git Node.js library; foundational dependency na nakaembed sa libu-libong CI/CD pipelines at developer tooling. Nabanggit ng Cyble ang 31 high-priority vulnerabilities na nakakaapekto sa Microsoft / Adobe / Apache / JetBrains products sa parehong disclosure window.

citations.label: Cyble - Weekly Vulnerabilities Surge Signals Rising Risk For 2026

bullets.body: **CVE Brief Apr 26 daily roll-up — 19 aktibong na-exploit + 1 critical + 31 high-priority** — Patuloy ang aktibong exploitation sa 19 KEV-listed vulnerabilities na sumasaklaw sa Microsoft Office / Exchange / SharePoint / Adobe Acrobat / Apache ActiveMQ / JetBrains TeamCity / SimpleHelp.

citations.label: CVE Brief - April 26, 2026

sections.category: AI Security > Solutions: Zero-Trust Access Control for Agentic AI

bullets.body: **Okta for AI Agents — GA sa Apr 30, paglulunsad ng blueprint-for-secure-agentic-enterprise** — Habang papalapit ang GA, inilabas ng Okta ang blueprint sa Showcase 2026 sa paligid ng tatlong tanong: **nasaan ang mga agents ko, saan sila maaaring kumonekta, at ano ang kaya nilang gawin?** Mga capabilities: Agent Discovery & Governance para sa sanctioned + shadow agents, **Agent Gateway bilang central MCP control plane** (virtual MCP server na nag-a-aggregate sa Okta MCP registry), credential vaulting + auto-rotation, runtime enforcement sa pamamagitan ng universal logout. CEO Todd McKinnon: "ang pinakamahalagang produkto ng kompanya".

citations.label: Okta Newsroom - Okta announces new blueprint for the secure agentic enterprise

bullets.body: **Okta: Every Agent Needs an Identity (sa EA)** — Pre-GA framing ng "agent-as-first-class-identity" model na nagre-register ng AI agents sa central directory katabi ng humans / service accounts.

citations.label: Okta Blog - Every Agent Needs an Identity: Introducing Okta for AI Agents in Early Access

bullets.body: **Cross App Access: Protocol para sa AI at App Security** — Protocol ng Okta para sa pagsi-secure ng AI-agent at app-to-app connections, sentral sa Agent Gateway architecture.

citations.label: Okta Identity 101 - Cross App Access

bullets.body: **MCP Security Explained: Guide to Zero Trust for Agentic AI** — Apr 2026 explainer ng TrueFoundry sa application ng zero-trust sa agentic AI / MCP control planes.

citations.label: TrueFoundry - MCP Security Explained: Guide to Zero Trust for Agentic AI

sections.category: AI Security > Solutions: Monitor and Manage AI Agent Behavior

bullets.body: **Indirect prompt injection sa "wild" — 32% YoY rise (Nov 2025-Feb 2026), Google Online Security Blog Apr 24** — Kinukuwantipika ng primary research piece ng Google ang **32% increase sa malicious prompt-injection content** na nakakalat sa open web, na may **10 confirmed in-the-wild IPI attacks** na naidokumento — kaya general na ang banta mula sa "GitHub comments" patungo sa **"open web"**.

citations.label: The Hacker News - Google Patches Antigravity IDE Flaw Enabling Prompt Injection Code Execution

bullets.body: **CSO Online: Pinaging-RCE ng prompt injection ang Antigravity file search ng Google** — Pang-praktisyoner na pagsusuri kung paano lumampas ang exec-batch flag injection sa Secure Mode boundary ng Antigravity.

citations.label: CSO Online - Prompt injection turned Google's Antigravity file search into RCE

bullets.body: **Cloud Security Alliance Lab Space: Antigravity Sandbox Escape: Prompt Injection at Native Tool Abuse** — Industry-aimed research note ng CSA sa pattern ng "agentic-IDE-prompt-injection-sandbox-escape".

citations.label: Cloud Security Alliance - Agentic IDE Prompt Injection Sandbox Escape

bullets.body: **Hawak ng NVIDIA ang $5.12T market cap pagkatapos ng Apr 24 record close ($208.27, +4.3%); FY27 Q1 print sa May 20 na may consensus na 3-digit EPS growth / +77% revenue YoY** — Stance ng Wall Street: "Own It, Don't Trade It". Ang Intel Q1 2026 beat (EPS $0.29 vs $0.01, revenue $13.6B +7% YoY) ay nagdrive ng +24% Apr 24 close sa $82.57 — pinakamalaking single-day move mula 1987.

citations.label: Motley Fool - Stock Market Today, April 24: Nvidia Surges on Soaring AI Chip Demand

bullets.body: **AMD MTD +45% hanggang Apr 24, +13.90% sa Apr 24 lamang ($347.77); Q1 2026 print May 5** — Estimates: revenue $9.84B, EPS YoY +33%. Ang Intel-beat + NVIDIA $5T sector chain ay nag-a-accelerate. iShares Semiconductor ETF MTD +40.4% hanggang Apr 24.

citations.label: IndexBox - Nvidia Stock Gains 19% in April as Semiconductor ETF Rises 40.4%

Walk-through ng Tesla advisor sa "green living" stack ng EV + home energy + Optimus. Hiwalay na kinumpirma ng Apr 22 Electrek ang shift ng mass-production timeline ng Optimus V3.

Ang AEON ng Hexagon Robotics (22 sensors / self-swap battery / 4-layer Physical AI / autonomy na natutuhan sa 20 demos) ay tumitingin sa summer pilot.
